## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm changeset` has been run and a changeset file is included
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no errors
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, internal URLs, client names, or PII introduced
- [ ] Any new npm dependency has a GPL-compatible license (MIT, BSD, ISC, Apache-2.0, LGPL, or GPL)
- [ ] Block namespace uses `BLOCKS_NS` constant — no hardcoded strings like `alive/` or project-specific prefixes
